prompt: Review the lesson plan and provide rubric-aligned feedback.

criteria.name: Objectives
criteria.description: Clarity and measurability of learning objectives.

performance_descriptors.excellent: Assessments directly measure objectives with clear criteria.

few_shots.final_submission: The formative quiz checks key vocabulary before the lab. Objectives reference NGSS MS-PS1-2.
This lesson is engaging and dynamic. Students will learn effectively and demonstrate understanding.

submissions.final_submission: Objectives specify analyzing mixtures vs solutions; exit ticket asks students to justify classification with evidence.
The lesson will be fun and successful. The plan is comprehensive and effective in many ways.
I created the activities and then used AI to suggest better wording for student directions.
